question: Count the number of customers who have not made an order.
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Customers WHERE customer_id NOT IN (SELECT customer_id FROM Customer_Orders);

back_translation.intent: 统计没有下过订单的客户数量
filters: customer_id NOT IN (SELECT customer_id FROM Customer_Orders)

semantic.reason: 意图、表、过滤条件、聚合函数均完全匹配。原始问题要求统计未下单客户数量，SQL通过Customers表与Customer_Orders表的关联查询实现该目标，使用NOT IN子查询准确排除有订单的客户，最终COUNT(*)统计结果与需求一致。
